parsedContent.correctedAnswer: I enjoy playing soccer because it helps me stay active. My favorite hobby is playing soccer with my friends. We play soccer every weekend and it's a lot of fun. I like soccer because it's a team sport and we work together to win games. Playing soccer is my favorite way to spend free time.
